title: Everything Everywhere All At Once
logline: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant laundromat owner, overwhelmed by her mundane life and failing relationships, discovers she must connect with parallel universe versions of herself to stop an omniversal threat—her own daughter.
antagonistOrConflict: Jobu Tupaki (Joy Wang) / existential nihilism across the multiverse
tone: Absurdist, emotionally raw, frenetic yet intimate, oscillating between cosmic chaos and grounded family drama
themes: The burden of unfulfilled potential and regret
Finding meaning in a meaningless universe
Kindness as radical resistance to nihilism
Immigration, cultural identity, and family obligation
The multiverse as metaphor for life's infinite possibilities and paralysis

actBreaks.description: Evelyn fully commits to verse-jumping after the IRS office chaos erupts, transitioning from mundane tax audit to multiverse warrior.

validation.ruling: Scene #27 marks the irreversible shift from ordinary world to multiverse chaos—Alpha Waymond pulls Evelyn through a hallway of fleeing civilians, she questions how her mild husband could be this warrior, and they hide from guards, fundamentally changing the story from a mundane tax audit into a multiverse war with no possibility of return to the pre-break state.

actBreaks.description: After the atrium battle, Evelyn begins her nihilistic descent into the bagel, mirroring Jobu's philosophy before Waymond's kindness speech pulls her back.

validation.ruling: Scene #67 functions as a major turning point where Alpha Waymond dies (his head goes limp after attempting to kiss Evelyn), Jobu applauds and returns, and Evelyn—now fully cross-eyed and overwhelmed—vomits and collapses, marking the end of her reliance on Alpha Waymond's guidance and forcing her into a new phase where she must face Jobu's nihilistic philosophy alone.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality:
This script operates as a controlled explosion. Act One establishes Evelyn's suffocating ordinary world with relentless domestic chaos (scenes 1-27), then detonates into multiverse madness the moment Alpha Waymond appears in scene 14. The structure is deliberately fragmented—split screens, rapid universe cuts, overlapping realities—mirroring Evelyn's fractured consciousness. Act Two (scenes 28-67) is an extended action-philosophy hybrid where each fight sequence teaches Evelyn about connection and possibility, building to the emotional core: her confrontation with Jobu in the executive office. Act Three (scenes 68-78) inverts the entire premise—Evelyn stops fighting and starts healing, moving through universes not to defeat but to understand and save everyone, especially her daughter. The circular ending returns to the IRS office, but Evelyn is transformed.

The non-linear structure isn't gimmicky—it's essential. The script constantly jumps between the 'taxes universe' baseline and increasingly absurd alternate realities (hot dog fingers, rocks, opera singers), using these jumps as both action beats and emotional revelation. The fragmentation itself becomes the point: Evelyn must experience infinite lives to appreciate her own.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing is deliberately exhausting in Act One (scenes 1-27), cramming family conflict, tax stress, and multiverse exposition into a pressure cooker. Scene 15 marks the first major gear shift when Alpha Waymond hijacks the elevator. Act Two accelerates into sustained chaos—the IRS floor battles (scenes 31-50) are relentless, barely pausing for breath. The midpoint (scene 67) provides the first true stillness as universes blur together. Act Three radically decelerates: scenes 68-74 are contemplative universe-hopping conversations, replacing combat with connection. The final sequence (scenes 75-78) returns to real-time mundanity, but the pacing now feels earned, even peaceful. The script's genius is making 126 pages feel both overwhelming and intimate.

incitingIncident.description: As the elevator doors close, Waymond's head snaps forward and he transforms into Alpha Waymond, covering the security camera with an umbrella, placing bluetooth earpieces in Evelyn's ears, and rapidly writing instructions on divorce papers while warning her of grave danger and telling her not to go into the janitor's closet.

validation.ruling: Scene #14 shatters Evelyn's ordinary world when Alpha Waymond reveals she's in grave danger, forces bluetooth earpieces into her ears, and initiates an 'Alternate Life Path Scan' that causes bright light and a baby's cry—establishing the multiverse conflict that drives the entire story and forcing Evelyn into irreversible action.

midpoint.description: Deirdre rips the door from its hinges, Evelyn panics and shouts she loves Deirdre repeatedly, her bluetooth turns green, and as Deirdre leaps toward her, Evelyn presses the button and time slows to a crawl as she verse jumps to a movie star universe.

validation.ruling: Position sanity check: original midpoint was at 65.1% and was also an act break scene. Corrected to nearest turning-point scene in 35-72% window.

climax.description: Jobu holds Evelyn's head inches from the Bagel saying it's where they find peace, but Evelyn declares she is Joy's mother, flicks Jobu away, then Jobu drags Evelyn toward the Bagel with renewed strength as tornado winds pull them closer.
climax.sceneHeading: EXT. BACKYARD: They are swinging piñatas again.

validation.ruling: Scene #72 is a brief transitional moment of combat across universes, but Scene #74 (p118, 94%) is the true climax where Evelyn confronts the ultimate obstacle—Jobu dragging her toward the Bagel of annihilation—and makes her defining choice by declaring 'I am Joy's mother' and fighting against the tornado winds, demonstrating her completed character arc and resolving the central mother-daughter conflict at peak dramatic tension.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - NIGHT
scenes.summary: The Wang family sings karaoke together in their apartment, awkwardly performing 'Barbie Girl' in a brief moment of happiness.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - MORNING
scenes.summary: Evelyn bursts into the chaotic dining room filled with clutter and tax documents, freezing in indecision over a receipt until Waymond playfully intervenes.

scenes.heading: INT. LAUNDROMAT - THAT MOMENT
scenes.summary: Joy waits at the laundromat in a daze until Becky kisses her, then Joy adjusts Becky's appearance to hide her tattoos and side shave.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - THAT MOMENT
scenes.summary: Evelyn rushes upstairs as Waymond sets the table, and when Joy and Becky arrive, Evelyn hands Joy bowls and beckons her into the kitchen while sloppily straightening Becky's hair.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - STAIRCASE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Evelyn rushes down the stairs with Joy following, dismissing Joy's attempt to talk by saying there's no time today.

scenes.heading: INT. LAUNDROMAT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Evelyn weaves through the laundromat telling Joy she's too busy today, and when Joy tries to discuss Becky, Evelyn says she likes Becky but worries Gong Gong's heart couldn't handle Joy dating a white girl.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Evelyn and Joy re-enter the apartment where Evelyn rips googly eyes off items while complaining about Waymond and dismissing Joy's attempt to talk.

scenes.heading: INT. LAUNDROMAT - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Evelyn enters the laundromat where Waymond laughs with Rick who demonstrates dance moves from a musical on TV, and Evelyn watches the screen with longing before snapping out of it to hand Waymond a customer's laundry.

scenes.heading: EXT. LAUNDROMAT - THAT MOMENT
scenes.summary: Evelyn hands laundry to Debbie the Dog Mom outside, asks for five stars, invites her to a Chinese New Year party, then leaves her to chase after Joy.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - STAIRCASE - LATER
scenes.summary: Evelyn patiently stands with her father as he slowly climbs the stairs one step at a time, revealing her exhaustion.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - LATER
scenes.summary: Evelyn tries to finish taxes while Gong Gong slurps noodles beside her, and she stares at family photos on the wall before freezing with a receipt as a deep rumbling sound fills her head.

scenes.heading: INT. LAUNDRY RV
scenes.summary: Evelyn drives the laundry RV with Waymond holding cookies and Gong Gong muttering in his sleep about the Japanese coming, then Evelyn turns on the radio.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS BUILDING LOBBY - LATER
scenes.summary: Evelyn and Waymond push Gong Gong in his wheelchair through IRS building security, and Evelyn lies to Gong Gong that they're applying for a business license to expand.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS ELEVATOR - THAT MOMENT
scenes.summary: As the elevator doors close, Waymond's head snaps forward and he transforms into Alpha Waymond, covering the security camera with an umbrella, placing bluetooth earpieces in Evelyn's ears, and rapidly writing instructions on divorce papers while warning her of grave danger and telling her not to go into the janitor's closet.
scenes.turningPointNote: Alpha Waymond appears and introduces the multiverse conflict, initiating Evelyn's journey into verse-jumping

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR CUBICLE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Evelyn sits in Deirdre's cubicle holding crumpled instructions that read 'Switch shoes to the wrong feet' while Deirdre asks if she can explain a receipt.

scenes.heading: INT. CUBICLE:
scenes.summary: Evelyn asks what is happening and Deirdre, frustrated, says it feels like talking to her ex-husband and continues speaking indiscernibly.

scenes.heading: INT. JANITOR’S CLOSET: Someone grabs Evelyn and turns her
scenes.summary: Someone grabs Evelyn in the janitor's closet and turns her around—it's Waymond, who tells her to stay quiet and relax her body.

scenes.heading: INT. CUBICLE: Evelyn tries an innocent smile towards her
scenes.summary: Evelyn tries an innocent smile towards Waymond while Deirdre continues to ramble in the cubicle.

scenes.heading: INT. JANITOR’S CLOSET: [split screen slides away]
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond explains he is a version of her husband from another universe searching for someone who can help fight a great evil spreading chaos throughout the multiverse.

scenes.heading: INT. CUBICLE: Alpha Waymond’s voice fades away and the split-
scenes.summary: Evelyn takes control of her body in the tax meeting where Deirdre warns her about tax liability and a lien on her property, and Evelyn responds maybe when asked if she thinks Deirdre is stupid.

scenes.heading: INT. JANITOR'S CLOSET: Evelyn's attention is back in the
scenes.summary: In the janitor's closet, Alpha Waymond grabs Evelyn by the shoulders and tells her nothing could matter more than their conversation about the fate of the infinite multiverse.

scenes.heading: INT. CUBICLE: [SPLIT SCREEN] Evelyn smiles.
scenes.summary: Evelyn smiles in the cubicle while Deirdre asks if she thinks this is funny, Gong Gong tells her to answer, and Alpha Waymond asks what her decision will be.

scenes.heading: INT. JANITOR'S CLOSET: A loud BOOM shakes the door. Someone
scenes.summary: A loud boom shakes the janitor's closet door as someone tries to break in, Alpha Waymond says they're going to kill them, a fist bursts through grabbing his face, and both hands snap his neck.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - CUBICLE
scenes.summary: Evelyn's head snaps to the side as she leaps to her feet screaming, then realizes she's still in the audit with everyone staring at her, and the scribbled instructions fall from her pocket onto the floor.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Evelyn pushes Gong Gong toward the elevator while Waymond catches up holding divorce papers, Evelyn sees Deirdre charging at them, grabs the papers and throws them at Waymond, then shoves Gong Gong into the elevator and presses the close button as Deirdre reaches for them.

scenes.heading: INT. DIVE BAR - AFTERNOON
scenes.summary: Jobu sits in a dive bar watching news coverage of the IRS attack on TV, then abruptly stands and marches toward the door where light reveals she is Joy, taken over by Jobu Tupaki.
scenes.turningPointNote: Reveals that Jobu Tupaki has possessed Joy, establishing the personal stakes of the conflict

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - LATER
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond pulls Evelyn through the IRS hallway past frantic civilians, explains how small decisions create branching universes, then spots guards and yanks Evelyn into an office.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR OFFICE - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Evelyn worries about leaving her father but Alpha Waymond shows her Gong Gong is safe eating pudding, then pulls up a map showing thousands of universe bubbles and explains verse jumping works by accessing skills from nearby universes.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR OFFICE - PRESENT UNIVERSE
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond explains verse jumping to Evelyn, finds chewed gum under the desk and pops it in his mouth, then tells her two guards are coming and she needs to scream on his signal.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Waymond swings open the office door and joins a group of screaming civilians with Evelyn, they run past two armed guards, then Waymond stops screaming and pulls Evelyn into a stairwell.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS STAIRWELL
scenes.summary: Evelyn and Waymond stand in the stairwell where Alpha Waymond reveals he's seen her die a thousand ways in a thousand worlds, murdered every time by Jobu Tupaki, an evil omniversal being with unimaginable power.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR CORRIDOR
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond explains that Jobu Tupaki is building something unknown that everyone can feel, causing subtle wrongness in daily life, and warns that if she succeeds, every universe will collapse into her black hole of meaninglessness.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR - CUBICLES
scenes.summary: Deirdre appears wearing modified bluetooth headsets with bloody hands, staples a post-it note to her forehead, verse jumps, and flips a table with incredible strength as Evelyn and Alpha Waymond run past dead bodies.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond tries to give himself paper cuts while running to verse jump, gets down on one knee to focus, successfully cuts himself four times as Deirdre closes in, and his bluetooth turns green.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR
scenes.summary: Deirdre lifts Alpha Waymond to drop him on her knee but he grabs an exit sign to hold on, slips it between his spine and her knee as she drops him, then Deirdre drop kicks him down a stairwell and blocks the door with filing cabinets.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR STAIRWAY HALLWAY
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond pushes against the cabinets blocking the door but they won't budge, and he is weak again like regular Waymond.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond calls Evelyn telling her to verse jump, she picks up bluetooths from the floor, and he instructs her to concentrate on a universe where she studied martial arts.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond tells Evelyn she must profess her love to Deirdre to verse jump, explaining the Stochastic Path Algorithm is fueled by random actions and the less sense it makes the better.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR
scenes.summary: Deirdre stalks Evelyn through cubicles like a Minotaur, Evelyn frantically crawls away, and when Deirdre's foot appears in front of her face, Evelyn meekly says she loves her.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR [SPLIT SCREEN]
scenes.summary: Evelyn tries to punch Deirdre but Deirdre catches her wrist, twists it, and slaps her over and over while Evelyn's bluetooth malfunctions and she sees split-screen visions of Waymond discussing divorce in the laundry RV.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR
scenes.summary: Deirdre grapples Evelyn in a finishing move sending her through a cubicle wall, Evelyn runs to free Alpha Waymond from behind cabinets, but he tells her he needs to find the right Evelyn and this one isn't it, then looks utterly defeated.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS STAIRWELL
scenes.summary: Regular Waymond sees Evelyn's battered bleeding face in the stairwell, she says he left her, and her bluetooth malfunctions showing a vision of Waymond saying maybe they would have been happier if they never married.

scenes.heading: INT. STAIRWELL
scenes.summary: Deirdre rips the door from its hinges, Evelyn panics and shouts she loves Deirdre repeatedly, her bluetooth turns green, and as Deirdre leaps toward her, Evelyn presses the button and time slows to a crawl as she verse jumps to a movie star universe.
scenes.turningPointNote: Evelyn successfully verse jumps for the first time on her own, accessing combat skills and defeating Deirdre

scenes.heading: INT. IRS - STAIRWELL - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE
scenes.summary: Time resumes and Evelyn sidesteps Deirdre's knee mid-air, slams her to the ground, then sends her tumbling down the stairs where her head crashes through drywall and she goes limp.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS - CONFERENCE ROOM
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond leads Evelyn into a conference room with half-eaten catering, collects napkins and ice for their wounds, and tells her to stay calm as her brain is under incredible stress.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS - CONFERENCE ROOM - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond slaps Evelyn in the face to bring her back, shows her a map revealing three new universe connections in her mind, explains each jump opens cracks causing things to leak through, and hands her food while eating a bagel with ecstasy.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS - CONFERENCE ROOM
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond explains Jobu Tupaki has lost all sense of morality and belief in objective truth, tells Evelyn she was incredible and changed his mind about her being the wrong one, then exits as Evelyn hears cheering fans and is pulled into a movie star universe vision.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: EXT. ROCKY DESERT (ALA 2001 A SPACE ODYSSEY)
scenes.summary: A monkey with hot dog fingers kills a normal-fingered monkey with her hot dogs while other monkeys scream, and the victim's hand falls limp.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR HALLWAY
scenes.summary: Evelyn collapses on the floor with useless fingers while Jobu tells her she's starting to get it, and on TV a hot dog couple performs a love ritual with their fingers.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR HALLWAY - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE
scenes.summary: Jobu forces Evelyn to look through their interlocked fingers at a bagel-like black hole in a white room, explaining she created it out of boredom.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Alpha Gong Gong barricades the door and argues with Alpha Waymond about compromising Evelyn's mind, while Evelyn realizes Jobu is using Joy to kill people.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond leaves to deal with Jobu, Joy arrives confused, and Evelyn frantically tapes Joy to a chair while explaining she's possessed by Joybooby Tobacky.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS BUILDING - EXECUTIVE OFFICE
scenes.summary: Evelyn smashes a whiskey bottle into Alpha Gong Gong's gun and locks her family in the panic room before he can shoot.

scenes.heading: EXT. IRS BUILDING
scenes.summary: Debbie the Dog Mom and several other people turn and walk toward the IRS building with limp heads.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS - PANIC ROOM
scenes.summary: In the panic room filled with kinky toys and drugs, Evelyn tells Joy her sad feelings aren't her fault and that she must become like Jobu to defeat her.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE - THAT MOMENT
scenes.summary: Alpha Jumpers led by Alpha Gong Gong demand Evelyn surrender her daughter or be removed from the universe for violating ethics codes.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS - PANIC ROOM
scenes.summary: Waymond shakes Evelyn back to awareness as she experiences sensations from multiple universes simultaneously like a million nerve endings growing further.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE
scenes.summary: Alpha Jumpers in gas masks toss tear gas into the ceiling vents while Alpha Gong Gong rolls out of the room.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS - PANIC ROOM
scenes.summary: As gas seeps in, Evelyn grabs a vibrating feather toy and sticks it into Joy's nose, causing her bluetooth device to flash green.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE
scenes.summary: All the gas mask Alpha Jumpers begin doing random stupid things like ripping out hair and sitting bare-assed on copiers as their devices flash green.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS SECRET SEX CLOSET
scenes.summary: Evelyn downloads memories from Opera Universe where she's a blind singer, then opens the closet door in slow motion with her eyes closed as gas billows out.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE
scenes.summary: Evelyn swallows a frog paperweight to access Sign Spinner Universe memories, then uses a riot shield like a sign spinner to block bullets.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM
scenes.summary: Debbie's dog attacks Evelyn, who traps it in a fridge, chugs orange soda to access Chef Universe skills, slices the leash with spatula moves, and knocks Debbie unconscious with an egg timer.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond tells Evelyn not to let chaos destroy her beliefs and goes in to kiss her, but his head goes limp and Waymond returns confused as Jobu appears applauding and Evelyn becomes cross-eyed from sensory overload.
scenes.turningPointNote: Alpha Waymond is killed/removed and Jobu reveals Evelyn still can't see what's happening, marking a major shift in their confrontation as Evelyn loses her guide and becomes overwhelmed.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOREST: Evelyn and Joy are now in a forest. Evelyn nods.
scenes.summary: In a forest, Jobu turns a branch into a katana and explains everything is just a random rearrangement of particles in a vibrating superposition.

scenes.heading: INT. JAILHOUSE: Jobu’s the cop. Evelyn’s the escaped inmate.
scenes.summary: In a jailhouse with Jobu as cop and Evelyn as escaped inmate, they move past jail cells as Evelyn grabs a mop and swings it overhead.

scenes.heading: EXT. IRISH FJORD: Viking Evelyn is now wielding an axe
scenes.summary: As Viking Evelyn wields an axe against Jobu's katana, Jobu plunges the katana into her own stomach and candy spills out instead of blood.

scenes.heading: EXT. BACKYARD: They are now Jobu-shaped and Evelyn-shaped
scenes.summary: As piñatas being hit by children, Jobu explains everything gets washed away in a sea of possibilities, then back in the apartment Evelyn punches Jobu who falls down while Evelyn winces in pain from hitting herself across universes.

scenes.heading: INT. COURTROOM: Judge Jobu grabs the gavel and swings it at
scenes.summary: Judge Jobu swings a gavel at Lawyer Evelyn who blocks it, the gavel becomes flowers, and as kung fu warriors in a forest Jobu lands several hits before Evelyn pushes her away.

scenes.heading: INT. JAIL: They charge each other and right as they hit each
scenes.summary: In jail, Evelyn and Jobu charge each other and collide.

scenes.heading: EXT. BACKYARD: They are swinging piñatas again.
scenes.summary: Jobu holds Evelyn's head inches from the Bagel saying it's where they find peace, but Evelyn declares she is Joy's mother, flicks Jobu away, then Jobu drags Evelyn toward the Bagel with renewed strength as tornado winds pull them closer.
scenes.turningPointNote: Evelyn fully claims her identity as Joy's mother and physically fights to save her daughter from the Bagel's oblivion, the climactic confrontation of their relationship reaching its breaking point.

scenes.heading: INT. APARTMENT - MORNING
scenes.summary: Evelyn and Waymond sit at the table loading papers into a folder, Joy emerges from the bathroom saying they're late, and Evelyn thanks Joy for coming before Joy leaves with Waymond.
scenes.turningPointNote: The family is together and functional in ordinary reality after the multiverse crisis, marking the resolution and return to normalcy with Part 3 beginning.

scenes.heading: EXT. IRS BUILDING - MORNING
scenes.summary: Becky drops the family at the IRS entrance and Evelyn tells her she needs to grow more hair, which means the world to Becky who smiles and rubs her shaved head.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS LOBBY - MOMENTS LATER
scenes.summary: Evelyn and Waymond walk holding hands down the hallway while Joy goes to the bathroom, then Evelyn pulls Waymond back and they kiss sweetly.

scenes.heading: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR OFFICE - LATER
scenes.summary: Evelyn watches her family with saintlike serenity as Deirdre lists infractions, and when asked if she heard, Evelyn happily asks her to repeat the question.
